Localization.Name: Vegan Delight Omni Pack
Localization.Description:
NDR: 56
Effects: Hypertrophic, Hypo-Metabolic

Omni Packs use premium certified organic ingredients to create a complete balanced ready-to-eat meal with a premium taste.
